JUDGE:K. WILLIAM BEARD;CLERK:ECLAVERIA;RPTR:MARILYN NORMAN 3:42PM: C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. STEVEN SHORR APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF JULIANO SILVA, A MINOR (WHO WAS PRESENT WITH HIS GUARDIAN JULIO SILVA;SCOTT STRATMAN APPEARING FOR DEFTS MANMOHAN & PRABHA KAPUR; DEBORAH CHEW APPEARING FOR DEFT AMERICAN CAB COMPANY, AND M.J. BOGATIN APPEARING FOR WONDEWOSSEN MEKBIB. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS OF SETTLEMENT RECITED ON THE RECORD BY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL, MR. SHORR. THE AGREED SETTLED AMOUNT APORTIONED AS FOLLOWS: $ 300 - BE PAID BY AMERICAN CAB CO. 2750 - BE PAID BY MEKBIB; 4350 - BE PAID BY MANMOHAN & PRABHA KAPUR. ATTORNEY'S FEE TO BE TAKEN IS 20% INSTEAD OF 25%. A PETITION TO COMPROMISE WILL BE MADE BY PLFF'S COUNSEL & BE HEARD IN ABOUT 2 WEEKS. (SEE RECORD FOR MORE DETAILS) PLFF IS TO PREPARE THE MINOR'S COMPROMISE AND THEN SIGNED BY THE PRESIDING JUDGE
